title: Kuehne+Nagel India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kuehne+Nagel India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kuehne+Nagel India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Kuehne+Nagel India:
Kuehne+Nagel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kuehne+Nagel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
